combined_text: The Cranberries - Zombie - Lyrics Meaning "Back to song list The Cranberries - Zombie - Lyrics Meaning Inspired by the IRA bombing in Warrington, Cheshire in 1993. Two children, Jonathan Ball and Tim Parry, were killed. Released in 1994 it was the bands leading single reaching number 1 in over 4 countries it became the bands most successful
